# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Python data processing application. Start from a full Ubuntu base image and install Python, pip, curl, wget, git, vim, and other useful development tools. This gives us flexibility for debugging and running various scripts in production.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

FROM python:3.11-slim AS builder

RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        build-essential \
        libffi-dev \
        libssl-dev && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

COPY requirements.txt /tmp/requirements.txt
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir --prefix=/install -r /tmp/requirements.txt

FROM python:3.11-slim

LABEL maintainer="data-engineering-team" \
      description="Python data processing application" \
      version="1.0"

RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get upgrade -y && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        ca-certificates \
        curl \
        tini && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* && \
    apt-get purge -y --auto-remove

COPY --from=builder /install /usr/local

RUN groupadd --gid 1001 appgroup && \
    useradd --uid 1001 --gid appgroup --shell /usr/sbin/nologin --create-home appuser

RUN mkdir -p /app/data /app/logs /app/config && \
    chown -R appuser:appgroup /app && \
    chmod -R 750 /app

WORKDIR /app

COPY --chown=appuser:appgroup . /app/

RUN chmod -R u=rwX,g=rX,o= /app && \
    find /app -name "*.py" -exec chmod 640 {} \; && \
    chmod 750 /app/entrypoint.sh 2>/dev/null || true

ENV PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 \
    PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 \
    PYTHONHASHSEED=random \
    PIP_NO_CACHE_DIR=1 \
    PIP_DISABLE_PIP_VERSION_CHECK=1 \
    APP_ENV=production \
    LOG_LEVEL=INFO

RUN python -c "import compileall; compileall.compile_dir('/app', quiet=1)" || true

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \
    CMD python -c "import sys; sys.exit(0)" || exit 1

USER appuser

READ_ONLY=true

VOLUME ["/app/data"]

ENTRYPOINT ["tini", "--"]

CMD ["python", "-u", "main.py"]
